Document:
# Currency
[textlink="View Full Wiki Page" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Currency"]
The Wasteland economy runs on scarcity, trust, and metal content. Not every faction accepts every form of payment, but bottlecaps come closest to universal.
## Currency Types
[bold][color=#a4885c]Currency[/color][/bold]
[bold][color=#a4885c]Value[/color][/bold]
[bold][color=#a4885c]Denominations[/color][/bold]
[bold]Bottlecaps[/bold]
1 cap = 1 unit (universal standard)
1, 10, 50, 100, 500
[bold]NCR Dollars[/bold]
[color=#cc3333]0.5 per dollar[/color] (2 dollars = 1 cap)
10, 50, 100, 500
[bold]Legion Aureus[/bold]
10x Denarius (gold coin)
Individual coins
[bold]Legion Denarius[/bold]
Base unit (silver coin)
Individual coins
[bold]Pre-War Money[/bold]
Cosmetic / 1 per unit (no real trade value)
10, 50, 100, 500
## Wallets
Wallets (equipped in belt or ID slot) hold multiple currency types simultaneously. All items tagged as [bold]Currency[/bold] are wallet-eligible.
## Economic Notes
[bold]Bottlecaps[/bold] are the default medium of exchange across the Wasteland.
[bold]NCR Dollars[/bold] trade at [color=#cc3333]half value[/color] due to inflation and limited acceptance outside NCR territory.
[bold]Legion currency[/bold] is accepted widely due to its metal content — gold and silver hold intrinsic worth.
[bold]Pre-War Money[/bold] has no standardized trade value. It is a curiosity, not a currency.
